# Howard Convent Sr. Sec. School

Howard Convent Sr. Sec. School is a CBSE-affiliated senior secondary school located in Kanth, Moradabad, Uttar Pradesh, India.

## Key Facts
- Full name: Howard Convent Sr. Sec. School
- CBSE Affiliation Number: 2132869
- School Code: 81918
- Founded: 2012
- Trust: Jagriti Charitable Trust
- Location: 3KM Milestone, Near Garhi, Dhampur Road, Kanth, Moradabad – 244501, Uttar Pradesh, India
- Principal: Mrs. Renu Vishnoi (M.A., B.Ed., 16 years experience)
- Chairman: Deepesh Singh
- Phone: +91 9319985501
- Email: howardconventschool9@gmail.com
- Website: https://www.howardconventschool.in

## Academics
- Grades offered: Nursery to Class XII (Pre-Primary through Senior Secondary)
- Streams available at Class XI–XII: Science (PCM/PCB), Commerce, Humanities
- Board: Central Board of Secondary Education (CBSE), New Delhi

## Facilities
- 45 smart classrooms with digital interactive panels
- Campus area: 7,180 sq. mtr. (1.77 acres)
- Science, Computer, and Maths laboratories
- Library with books, journals, and digital resources
- Spacious playground and sports ground (cricket, football, athletics)
- School transport on selected routes in Kanth and Moradabad
- Medical room with trained first-aid staff

## Student Strength
- 1,000+ students enrolled
- 40+ staff members (teaching and non-teaching)

## Board Results
- CBSE 2024: Class X — 86.73% pass rate (98 appeared, 85 passed); Class XII — 100% pass rate (28/28 passed)
- CBSE 2023 results: Class X and Class XII result gazetted (scanned copies available on the website)
- CBSE 2025 results: Class X result gazetted (Class XII results forthcoming)

## Admission
- Admissions open annually from January–February for the April academic session
- Documents required: Birth certificate, previous marksheets, Aadhar card (student and parent), passport photos, character certificate, caste certificate (if applicable), medical fitness certificate
- Contact: +91 9319985501 or visit campus between 9:00 AM – 4:00 PM, Monday–Saturday

## About
Howard Convent Sr. Sec. School has been serving families in Kanth and Moradabad since 2012. The school follows the CBSE curriculum and is committed to holistic education — nurturing academic excellence, character, and compassion in every student.
